decisions.approval_source: explicit operator instruction: Approve all 13 D1B recommendations.
decisions.selected_option_semantics: Category + collision-resistant source namespace: /var/lib/mk04/archive/<category>/<source_root_id_or_preservation_set_id>/<stable_relpath>; retain original source path as provenance metadata in the migration manifest; no deletion; archive not writable by ordinary live/test services

decisions.approval_source: explicit operator instruction: Approve all 13 D1B recommendations.
decisions.selected_option_semantics: Deterministic protected slot layout under live.credentials: <execution_class>/<connection_or_slot_id>/<role> with original basename retained only as provenance metadata; missing slots recorded as absence records (not empty files); secret values never embedded; test execution class has no real credential material; protected-live preparation distinct from protected-archive preservation paths

decisions.approval_source: explicit operator instruction: Approve all 13 D1B recommendations.
decisions.selected_option_semantics: Archive-default for PRESERVE_EXACT_LOCAL_BYTES unless ALL deterministic evidence criteria hold for assets.shared_validated: (1) artifact type/consumer prove shared machine asset use; (2) replaceable/reproducible acquisition OR validated exact local bytes required as shared asset; (3) validated shared use by live and/or test as read-only; (4) not credential/control/queue/mutable DB; (5) candidate execution cannot mutate the live-consumed copy; (6) RECONSTRUCT_FROM_ACCEPTED_GIT → code/reconstruct path not assets; (7) REGENERATE_FROM_PINNED_LOCAL_INPUTS → scratch/no-copy not assets. Ambiguous → archive or unresolved. Dev/prod labels never decide. SHARED_REPLACEABLE_ASSET never auto-means assets root. Known useful assets that meet criteria are not archived merely for undefined rules.

decisions.approval_source: explicit operator instruction: Approve all 13 D1B recommendations.
decisions.selected_option_semantics: Continuity runtime roots (policy proposal, not pre-settled Stage 2 architecture beyond 'outside brain'): logs/diagnostics at /var/log/mk04 (durable diagnostics, not application authority); large disposable scratch at /var/tmp/mk04 (not under /run; contains no authoritative state). /run/mk04 remains ephemeral coordination only (locks/sockets/pids). Both outside live/test state bundles. Historical inventoried logs mapped to archive/logging boundary are NOT silently treated as disposable scratch.

decisions.approval_source: explicit operator instruction: Approve all 13 D1B recommendations.
decisions.selected_option_semantics: No shared admin group. Privileged Continuity administration is performed by root via narrowly scoped root-managed installer/admin commands — not by a standing mk04-admin group and not by ambient group-read. The word 'admin' in asset/archive write recommendations means this root-managed command path, not a separate group principal.

decisions.approval_source: explicit operator instruction: Approve all 13 D1B recommendations.
decisions.selected_option_semantics: Symbolic matrix: mk04 owns live state sections it runs; mk04-test owns test state only and is technically denied live state and live credentials; root owns bindings, releases/install, and root-managed administrative boundaries; assets consumed RO by live/test service principals; services may write only sections they own. Numeric UID/GID allocation is Stage 4. Legacy ownership is not future policy.

decisions.approval_source: explicit operator instruction: Approve all 13 D1B recommendations.
decisions.selected_option_semantics: POSIX-only least privilege implements the coherent access policy with the owner matrix and root-managed admin commands: state 0640/0750; assets/releases 0644/0755 RO to services; credentials 0600/0700; archive not group-writable by mk04/mk04-test. ACLs remain exceptional and are NOT assumed present or absent from legacy null ACL probes — default policy is no ACL until a later inventory proves a specific need. POSIX groups alone are sufficient for this recommended policy when admin is root-managed commands (no standing admin group).

decisions.approval_source: explicit operator instruction: Approve all 13 D1B recommendations.
decisions.selected_option_semantics: Operators administer via narrowly scoped root-managed Continuity commands (installer/admin tooling invoked as root or via sudo-to-root that runs those commands). Do NOT sudo-to-mk04 for administration. Runtime identity mk04 remains for services only. Manual inspection may use root-managed read helpers without granting ambient write. No standing group-read on live files. This pairs with no shared admin group and root-managed asset/archive writes.

decisions.approval_source: explicit operator instruction: Approve all 13 D1B recommendations.
decisions.selected_option_semantics: Only root-managed Continuity installer/admin commands may update the assets root. Live and test service principals consume shared assets read-only and cannot mutate live-consumed copies. 'Admin' means root-managed commands (no shared admin group).

decisions.approval_source: explicit operator instruction: Approve all 13 D1B recommendations.
decisions.selected_option_semantics: Only root-managed Continuity preserve/installer commands may write the archive root. Live and test services are denied ordinary archive writes. Archive is not a writable working state plane. 'Admin' means root-managed commands (no shared admin group).

decisions.approval_source: explicit operator instruction: Approve all 13 D1B recommendations.
decisions.selected_option_semantics: Only selected initial-live (and explicitly selected test-bound) artifacts are eligible for operational absolute-path rewriting. Rewrites use explicit source-to-target root mappings — no blind string substitution. References and endpoints validate together; affected I4B consistency/atomic groups remain coordinated; missing endpoints fail closed. Archive/history retains original path evidence verbatim. Database path-bearing column transforms remain conditional on the accepted zero-write inspection/preflight contract. Relative/dynamic/template/file-URI gaps are not claimed absent merely because absolute PREF corpus lacks them.

decisions.approval_source: explicit operator instruction: Approve all 13 D1B recommendations.
decisions.selected_option_semantics: Incomplete/incompatible legacy records default to preserved archive or unresolved treatment. Rewrite requires sufficient context AND an explicit rule under DEC-ABSOLUTE-PATH-REWRITE-POLICY. Do not invent missing funnel/config/media context. Do not promote legacy artifacts to initial-live merely for coverage. Do not convert unresolved evidence into disposable material.

decisions.approval_source: explicit operator instruction: Approve all 13 D1B recommendations.
decisions.selected_option_semantics: CREATE_DIRECTORY (structure/metadata only) then process children individually. Never recursive-copy content via a directory row when children are inventoried. Create required containers before child placement. Distinguish directory metadata from child content. Preserve symlinks as links (do not traverse blindly). Preserve accepted I4B SQLite and same-job atomic units. Directory containment alone is NOT an atomic lifecycle group. Empty required directories receive explicit CREATE_DIRECTORY treatment. Supports later ownership/mode validation on dirs and children separately. No actions assigned in D1B.
